title: lindera bokorensis
intro: Lindera bokorensis, also known as Bokor spice or Korean spice tree, is a type of plant that belongs to the Lauraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lindera bokorensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve symptoms of respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Lindera bokorensis include essential oils, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and salves for various health purposes.
